privacy_notes: This configuration is based only on the supplied synthetic school operations scenario and contains no student records or production customer data.
Reports are restricted to aggregate enrollment and billing summaries; raw classroom activity and student content are outside this workflow.
Campus, department, and support status are synthetic administrative field names; no option values were invented for them.

The users, invoices, and reports route suffixes are inferred from the supplied admin base path and resource summaries; HTTP methods, authorization headers, pagination details, error shapes, and write payloads remain unresolved.
Only the users and invoices response envelopes and the aggregate-only reports behavior were summarized; payload compatibility requires a sanitized contract fixture and tests before integration.
Roles, plans, notifications, and audit panels remain disabled because no endpoint contract was supplied for them; help is treated as a static local panel.
RBAC entries express least-privilege design intent and must also be enforced server-side with school-level scoping and default-deny behavior.
No secret, executable code, external asset URL, network call, or model API call is included in this artifact.
Brand colors, logos, fonts, and a formal product name were not supplied; the localized product label is a neutral description for human review.
test_checklist: Run the strict local config validator and require PASS before human review.
Confirm all eight required top-level sections are present and the panel, field, and endpoint registries are non-empty.
Human-review every role permission, including the non-owner role-management boundary and the read-only oversight scope.
Verify disabled panels cannot be opened by direct navigation and that hidden navigation is not treated as authorization.
Compare each inferred route and every request method and payload with a sanitized backend contract fixture before enabling integration.
Test the users response as an object with a users array and numeric total.
Test the invoices response as an object with an invoices array and numeric total.
Verify reports expose aggregate enrollment and billing summaries only and reject raw classroom activity or student content.
Verify every visible configurable field and option has both Turkish and English labels.
Verify the configured currency options are exactly TRY and EUR.
Test that unknown roles, permissions, panels, and actions are denied by default and that all operations are scoped to the active school.
Confirm no secrets, private records, external network calls, or executable content are present before recording the reviewed artifact.
